entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., a prominent crop in semi-arid and arid regions.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID AND ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Environmental regions where pigeonpea is commonly grown.

entities.name: HYBRID PIGEONPEA TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used to develop hybrid varieties of pigeonpea to meet future demand.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The magnitude of genetic differences among the studied pigeonpea hybrids.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation that is due to genetic factors.

entities.name: GENETIC ADVANCE
entities.description: The expected genetic gain from selection, expressed as a percent of the mean.

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The ability of CMS-based hybrids to restore pollen fertility.

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superiority of a hybrid over its parents in specific traits.

entities.name: CMS BASED HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids developed using the Cytoplasmic Male Sterility system.

entities.name: ASHA
entities.description: A check variety of pigeonpea used in the evaluation.

entities.name: MARUTI
entities.description: A check variety of pigeonpea used in the evaluation.

entities.name: LRG 41
entities.description: A check variety of pigeonpea used in the evaluation.

entities.name: BDN 711
entities.description: A check variety of pigeonpea used in the evaluation.

entities.name: KHARIF 2015
entities.description: The specific cropping season and year when the evaluation was conducted.

entities.name: ICRISAT PATANCHERU
entities.description: The research site where the pigeonpea hybrids were evaluated.

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine significant differences among the hybrids.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PRIMARY BRANCHES
entities.description: A morphological trait of pigeonpea evaluated for genetic variability and heritability.

entities.name: NUMBER OF SECONDARY BRANCHES
entities.description: A morphological trait of pigeonpea evaluated for genetic variability and heritability.

entities.name: POLLEN FERTILITY PERCENT
entities.description: A measure of the fertility of pollen in the developed hybrids.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: A yield-related trait of pigeonpea showing high levels of heterosis.

entities.name: POD WEIGHT PER PLANT
entities.description: A yield-related trait of pigeonpea showing high levels of heterosis.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The total weight of grains produced per plant, showing high levels of heterosis.

entities.name: ICPH 3762
entities.description: A promising CMS-based pigeonpea hybrid with high standard heterosis for grain yield.

entities.name: ICPH 4502
entities.description: A promising CMS-based pigeonpea hybrid with high standard heterosis for grain yield.
